calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eugene Seltzer for Edward Lyman (Administrator). Giulio Accornero for Kay Klossner and 15 other intestate heirs.

Mr. Seltzer presented a Declaration from John Boessenecker indicating that Jack William is represented by Paul Melbostad. Discussions were held with regard to direct notice to the heirs and how to address this issue. The Accounting Petition was taken under submission pending confirmation that Mr. Melbostad does not object to the form of revised order.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Off Calendar May-02-2011 Continued To Jun-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The matter was continued to June 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court wants direct notice sent to all 34 Heirs unless Counsel representing those Heirs state on the record that they are waiving notice on behalf of their Clients or they file consents on behalf of their Clients.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of The First And Final Account Of The Public Administrator
Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator. Eugene Seltzer for and with Edward Lyman (petitioner).

Mr. Weinkauf stated that there was no problem with the Public Administrator resigning, that he would file the resignation and that the Public Administrator waives the citation. Status of filing of the First and Final Account of the Public Administrator was set for January 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Removal of Public Administrator was taken off calendar. The Petition for Letters of Administration (Successor Administrator) will be granted subject to receipt of the Public Administrator's resignation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.
